LandingPage.subtitle: Gamblock-AI helps students recognize risky access, pause when an urge appears, and return to a healthier recovery step.
LandingPage.heroVisualNote: A small companion for a meaningful step
LandingPage.impactLink: Learn about the impact on young people
LandingPage.heroStatLabel: Online gambling money flow in Indonesia throughout 2025.
LandingPage.trustLabel: Classification runs on your device. Raw URLs, page content, and browsing history are not sent to the server.
LandingPage.supportersLabel: Part of the academic and PKM ecosystem
LandingPage.crisisTitle: The impact is real, especially for young people.
LandingPage.crisisSubtitle: Behind the large numbers are focus, relationships, and a sense of safety that can be disrupted. Recovery should begin without stigma.
LandingPage.problemTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
LandingPage.problemBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government and campus domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance: users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A real solution must unite content-based detection with automatic psychological intervention.
LandingPage.problemPoint1: Static blacklists can't keep up with rotating domains.
LandingPage.problemPoint2: Conventional DNS can't see camouflaged page content.
LandingPage.problemPoint3: Blocking without rehabilitation drives users to workarounds.
LandingPage.featuresTitle: Protection that does not stop at a block button.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: Each part supports a different moment, from recognizing risk to building a recovery routine.
LandingPage.f1Title: Recognizes risky patterns from within the device.
LandingPage.f1Body: Hybrid analysis evaluates address patterns and page content locally. It is designed to recognize disguised sites without sending raw browsing material to the server.
LandingPage.f1Bullet1: URLs and page content are processed only on-device
LandingPage.f1Bullet2: Minimises false positives on academic & gov sites
LandingPage.f1Bullet3: Raw browsing data is not sent to the server
LandingPage.f2Title: Creates a pause when the urge feels strongest.
LandingPage.f2Body: When risky access is detected, Pattern Interrupt creates a brief pause before guiding the user toward a safer, calmer next step.
LandingPage.f3Title: Commitment can feel lighter when it is supported.
LandingPage.f3Body: Users can connect a trusted partner. Requests that affect protection follow an approval flow, so important decisions are not made alone when an urge peaks.
LandingPage.f3Bullet3: Group Code links member to partner
LandingPage.f4Title: Build small routines that support recovery.
LandingPage.f4Body: The recovery space brings together check-ins, learning, daily missions, and private reflection to help users understand patterns and protect the next step.
LandingPage.f4Bullet2: Reflection journals use an encrypted storage flow
LandingPage.howTitle: Protection that works, recovery that stays human.
LandingPage.howStep1Body: Install the app on a supported device, create an account, then choose a trusted partner if you need one.
LandingPage.howStep2Body: The system runs silently as a background service, analysing page content without sending data off-device.
LandingPage.howStep3Body: When risk is detected, the protection app handles access, shows a Pattern Interrupt pause, then opens recovery options.
LandingPage.techTitle: Sensitive data stays where it belongs.
LandingPage.techSubtitle: Gamblock-AI separates local classification from account services. Raw browsing material does not become website analytics data.
LandingPage.techCard1Body: Classification, URLs, domains, page content, screenshots, and browsing history are processed locally and are not sent to the server.
LandingPage.techCard2Body: The server only handles account and recovery data you use, including aggregate protection events and partner flows you approve.
LandingPage.techCard3Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives on legitimate sites.
LandingPage.techMetric4Label: Raw URLs, page content, and browsing history are not sent to the server
LandingPage.psychoTitle: A space to understand patterns, not judge yourself.
LandingPage.psychoBody: After a difficult moment passes, users can record their condition, learn one concept, and choose a realistic small step for the day.
LandingPage.psychoItem1Body: Maps daily emotions to recognise urge triggers.
LandingPage.psychoItem2Body: Small self-control tasks that build adaptive habits.
LandingPage.psychoItem3Body: Personal notes are stored through an encrypted flow to support safer reflection.
LandingPage.platformTitle: Designed around the devices you use.
LandingPage.platformBody: The protection client is designed for Android and Windows. Installer availability follows the prototype development stage.
LandingPage.teamTitle: Built with research methods, by students for students.
LandingPage.teamBody: Gamblock-AI is being developed as a 2026 PKM-KC project by a cross-disciplinary informatics and psychology team from Universitas Teknologi Yogyakarta.
LandingPage.teamMember1Task: Leads project management and team coordination, builds the cross-platform system, and crawls URL datasets and page content (DOM) structure.
LandingPage.teamMember2Task: Multimedia captain: crafting social media content strategy, writing scripts, shooting footage, and editing anti-gambling videos for students.
LandingPage.teamMember3Task: Core AI developer: training, optimising, and testing the hybrid detection model, and hunting secondary datasets for on-device accuracy.
LandingPage.teamMember4Task: The mind behind the app's psychological intervention (Pattern Interrupt & psychoeducation), and guardian of Belmawa administration from finances to logbooks.
LandingPage.faqQ1: Does Gamblock-AI monitor my browsing history?
LandingPage.faqA1: No. Classification runs locally on your device. Raw URLs, domains, page content, screenshots, and browsing history are not sent to the server.
LandingPage.faqQ2: How does it detect gambling sites that change domains?
LandingPage.faqA2: Instead of relying only on blacklists, Gamblock-AI analyses page content (DOM) with Hybrid Analysis, combining Rule-Based and Logistic Regression to recognise gambling patterns even when domains change.
LandingPage.faqA3: A brief 5-10 second graphic animation that appears automatically when a gambling site is detected, designed to break the impulsive response before the urge strengthens, then guide the user to the psychoeducation space.
LandingPage.faqQ4: Why is an Accountability Partner needed?
LandingPage.faqA4: Because the biggest temptation is deleting the app when urges peak. Partner approval creates procedural friction that protects the recovery commitment.
LandingPage.faqA5: Gamblock-AI is still an academic PKM-KC 2026 prototype. Availability and access information will follow its development stage.
LandingPage.ctaTitle: You do not have to wait until everything feels easy.
LandingPage.ctaBody: Start with one step that feels safe. Recognize the pattern, protect your progress, and open support when you need it.
LandingPage.teamAdvisorTask: Guides the research and development direction, safeguards methodological quality, and provides academic validation at every phase of the PKM-KC program.

DampakContent.heroTitle: Online gambling isn't entertainment. It's a
DampakContent.heroBody: Throughout 2025, online gambling money flow in Indonesia hit staggering numbers and millions were ensnared. Students sit at the heart of this crisis, and Gamblock-AI is built as the answer.
DampakContent.demoTitle: Young people carry the heaviest burden.
DampakContent.demoBody: The impact on students is destructive and layered: misuse of tuition money, entanglement with illegal online loans, and severe psychological distress, stress, anxiety, and depression.
DampakContent.whyTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
DampakContent.whyBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance, users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A true solution must unite smart detection with automatic psychological intervention.
DampakContent.arc1Body: The urge appears; the user accesses a gambling site.
DampakContent.arc2Body: A 5–10 second visual animation breaks the impulsive response.
DampakContent.arc3Body: Guided to a Self-Regulation Theory psychoeducation module.
DampakContent.arc4Body: Mood tracker, daily missions, and a reflection journal build self-control.
DampakContent.ctaBody: Free, 100% private, designed by and for Indonesian students. Take back control of your life now.

TechnologyContent.heroBody: Conventional static blacklist blocking loses to gambling sites that swap domains daily. Gamblock-AI answers with Hybrid Analysis and On-Device AI: detecting from page content, not just the address, all without touching your privacy.
TechnologyContent.pipelineTitle: From access to block, in milliseconds.
TechnologyContent.pipelineSubtitle: Five sequential stages executed entirely on your device.
TechnologyContent.pipe1Body: The background service observes network activity.
TechnologyContent.pipe2Body: Text from key page elements (title, heading, anchor) is extracted.
TechnologyContent.pipe3Body: Text is represented as Bag-of-Words numeric features.
TechnologyContent.pipe4Body: Rule-Based + Logistic Regression score the page.
TechnologyContent.pillarsTitle: Designed for accuracy, built for privacy.
TechnologyContent.pillar1Body: Two detection layers: explicit address patterns caught by rules, camouflaged sites exposed by a content-based Logistic Regression model.
TechnologyContent.pillar2Body: Captures hidden text, meta tags, and element structure in real time before gambling content can render.
TechnologyContent.pillar3Body: Logistic Regression is chosen for being lightweight with low computational complexity, running efficiently in the background.
TechnologyContent.pillar4Body: No browsing history is sent to any server. All AI computation runs directly on your device's local processor.
TechnologyContent.pillar5Body: End-to-end protection across all network activity, not just the browser. Runs continuously in the background on Android and Windows.
TechnologyContent.pillar6Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives so academic sites aren't wrongly blocked.
TechnologyContent.finalBody: No data sent, no performance hit. Experience smart detection that respects your privacy.

SiteFooter.text_324: Sistem pertahanan digital berbasis on-device AI untuk memutus siklus judi online di kalangan mahasiswa Indonesia.
